layoutRegions.name: rotation-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for credential reports, rotated paths, staged changes, and blocked revokes.

layoutRegions.name: exposure-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: Compromised credential report inventory with source, owner, age, and rotation state.

layoutRegions.name: batch-and-cleanup-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Rotation windows, rollback snapshots, service owners, and post-incident cleanup tasks.

components.name: ReportCard
components.purpose: Focusable compromised credential card with report source, owner, age, and status.
interactions: state badge distinguishes rotated, staged, and blocked credentials
long source labels wrap without resizing sibling cards

components.name: RotationBatch
components.purpose: Grouped service rotation window with accountable owner and affected services.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review

components.name: RollbackSnapshot
components.purpose: Snapshot command and rollback anchor for safe credential changes.
interactions: rollback command wraps without horizontal overflow

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
